reading:
Reading is the activity of comprehending written language contained within resources such as books, magazines and newspapers.
The act of reading is a great way to learn about interesting and fun stories as a pastime by reading fiction-books, or to learn about new skills, technologies, sciences, and more from educational non-fiction books.
Book clubs are a great way to meet other people who enjoy this hobby. Reading can also be a comparatively inexpensive hobby depending on the books you read, as libraries are a crucial resource for using books without the high price of certain books getting in the way.
gaming:
Gaming refers to the activity of playing video games or board games.
Conventions, and competitive tournaments can be used to meet fellow ‘gamers’ in person, while online-video games can let people play video games from around the world through an internet connection.
But while gaming can be a fun activity, it can also be expensive due to the high costs of gaming hardware and the video games themselves.
cooking:
Cooking is the activity of creating food. Recipe books are a good way to get started, as they provide step-by-step examples of how to make meals.
Yeah, that’s about it.
sports:
Sports is a wide range of games involving physical exertion, which makes it a healthy hobby to pick up.
Examples of sports are football, tennis, rugby, basketball, cricket.
